title: Empirical Security raises $25M to predict your next breach
summary: Bellis and his chief technology officer, Michael Roytman, built Kenna Security, the firm that helped popularise risk-based vulnerability management. Prediction, Bellis argues, has become a requirement for modern defence, not a luxury.
caption: output/2026-07-21/empirical-security-raises-25m-to-predict-your-next-breach.txt
